launchId.description: Deprecated legacy alias for `workflowId`. If provided, its value is mapped to `workflowId`.

sessionId.description: Nextflow session identifier used to correlate subsequent trace updates.

runName.description: Workflow run name reported by Nextflow.

projectName.description: Pipeline or project name reported by Nextflow.

repository.description: Source repository URL or path for the workflow project.

workflowId.description: Existing workflow string identifier to associate with this trace create request.
